notes: Ivory Coast are without key defensive pillar Evan Ndicka (fitness concern ruled out of opener), with Odilon Kossounou stepping in, and there is a striker rotation battle between Guessand, Wahi, and Bonny. Ecuador's talismanic captain Enner Valencia — their only player with a double-figure international goal tally — is a minor fitness doubt ahead of kick-off, though he is expected to start; Kendry Paez is also nursing a knock but likely to play.
home_scorers: Amad Diallo (dangerous winger, top creator in recent friendlies incl. vs France)
Evann Guessand (first-choice striker, leading the line in predicted XIs)
Yan Diomande (emerging Bundesliga forward, set-piece threat and direct runner)
away_scorers: Enner Valencia (all-time Ecuador top scorer, 49 international goals, leads attac
Gonzalo Plata (second-highest scorer in squad on 8 goals, dangerous wide forward
Moises Caicedo (engine of midfield, drives into box, key creative force)
